problems.text: A big square is divided into smaller squares. The side of one of the smallest squares is 3 (marked on the picture). What is the length of the side of the bigger square marked by a question mark?
Sarah picks a two-digit number. She says: “The first digit of my number is 3 times smaller than the second digit. My number is greater than 30.” What is Sarah's number?
problems.label: The number:

problems.html: If gear number 1 is turning counter-clockwise, which direction will gear 6 turn? 💡 Hint When one gear turns clockwise, the gear next to it turns counter-clockwise. A belt (band) makes the gears it connects turn the same way.

problems.text: This is how numbers were written in cuneiform (the ancient Mesopotamian number system):
The structure is balanced and weighs 72 in total. How much does the heart element weigh?
